message:
fix(ci): accept ENOENT for outside-workspace stat on Windows

The fs_stat_host_fallback test checks that stat('/usr') is denied
because it's outside the workspace. On Windows, /usr doesn't exist
so the error is ENOENT instead of "outside extension root". Both
outcomes correctly prevent accessing files outside the workspace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
